'''Mark 1 automated walkers''' were small automated [[All Terrain Personal Transport/Legends|AT-PT]]-like [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

==Characteristics==
They were armed with two [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] cannons and a [[Concussion grenade/Legends|concussion grenade]] launcher.

==History==
Several Mark 1 droid [[Walker/Legends|walkers]] were stationed on [[Galak Fyyar]]'s ship, the ''[[Doomgiver]]'', during the [[Battle of Yavin 4 (Empire Reborn)|Second Battle of the Jedi Praxeum]]. These were all annihilated in the ship's destruction. Some units were also garrisoned at the [[Cairn Installation]] in the [[Lenico Belt]], but the fate of those remain unknown.

==Behind the scenes==
In the ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast]]'' game, the walkers' weapons referred to as blaster cannons are the same in appearance, effect, and damage as [[Kyle Katarn]]'s [[Bowcaster/Legends|bowcaster]].

{{Droid-stub}}
